svg.title: Cyberdeck physical wiring — daisy-chain
svg.desc: Physical wiring showing jumper connections from GPIO expansion board header 2 to PiSugar extension header, then daisy-chained onward to CardKB
svg.text: SDA and SCL originate at header 2 pins 19 and 23, land on PiSugar SDAT/SSCL,
then continue onward from PiSugar to CardKB — one continuous daisy-chain per line.
3.3V runs directly from pin 17 to CardKB VCC — PiSugar does not need 3.3V input.
